name: Subsets I
statement:
Given an array nums of n integers. Return array of sum of all subsets of the array nums.


Output can be returned in any order.

examples.explanation: When no elements is taken then Sum = 0. When only 2 is taken then Sum = 2. When only 3 is taken then Sum = 3. When element 2 and 3 are taken then sum = 2+3 = 5.
When no elements is taken then Sum = 0. When only 5 is taken then Sum = 5. When only 2 is taken then Sum = 2. When only 1 is taken then Sum = 1. When element 2 and 1 are taken then sum = 2+1 = 3.
